Reclaim Your SOL from Empty Token Accounts

Loading application...

About ClaimYourSOL

ClaimYourSOL helps you reclaim SOL from empty token accounts on the Solana blockchain. Each empty token account holds a small amount of SOL that can be reclaimed.

Fast & Secure

Close empty token accounts safely and receive your SOL instantly.

Transparent

Clear fee structure with no hidden costs.

Easy to Use

Connect your wallet and claim your SOL in minutes.

Frequently Asked Questions

What are empty token accounts?

Token accounts are created when you receive SPL tokens on Solana. Each account requires a small amount of SOL as rent. When you send all tokens, these accounts remain and continue to hold this SOL.

Is it safe to close empty token accounts?

Yes, it's completely safe to close empty token accounts. You'll recover the SOL held in these accounts, and you can always create new token accounts when needed.

How much SOL can I reclaim?

Each empty token account holds approximately 0.002 SOL. The total amount you can reclaim depends on how many empty token accounts you have.

Why is there a network fee?

The 18% network fee helps maintain the service and supports ongoing development. The fee is automatically calculated and deducted during the claim process.

What happens if I need the token account later?

If you receive tokens in the future, a new token account will be automatically created. Closing empty accounts now doesn't affect your ability to receive tokens later.

Features

  • Fast and secure token account closure
  • Automatic detection of empty accounts
  • Transparent fee structure
  • Real-time transaction confirmation
  • Support for all Solana wallets

Transaction Priority Levels

  • Low Priority: Minimum required fee, longer processing time
  • Medium Priority: Balanced fee and speed, recommended for most transactions
  • High Priority: Faster processing, higher fee for urgent transactions

Built on Solana • Safe and secure • Open source
